name: gitbattle
description: Real-time multiplayer Git command battle game — monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @gitbattle/server" "npm run dev -w @gitbattle/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @gitbattle/server && npm run build -w @gitbattle/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @gitbattle/server --if-present && npm run lint -w @gitbattle/web --if-present
